rule_text: All materials/stores procurement above Rs.1,00,000/- (Rs.1 lakh) by AP Government departments must be done through the e-procurement platform.
source_clause: GO Ms No 258 / Finance (TFR) Dept dated 20-09-2013, Order Para 3
verification_method: Check tender contains apeprocurement.gov.in tender_id and electronic-bid-submission proof

rule_text: GO Ms No 258/2013 amends Rule III(7) under Article 125 of AP Financial Code Vol-I — establishing the Rs.1 lakh e-procurement threshold for stores procurement.
source_clause: GO Ms No 258 / Finance (TFR) Dept dated 20-09-2013 read with Article 125 AP Financial Code Vol-I
verification_method: Treat AP Financial Code Article 125 Rule III(7) as the current binding provision (post-2013 amendment) for AP Goods procurement
